title: phlomis purpurea subsp. caballeroi
intro: Phlomis purpurea subsp. caballeroi is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as Jerusalem sage. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlomis purpurea subsp. caballeroi include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
